task_objective: Fix updater post-install regression by generalizing post-install update check suppression across all update paths (stable-to-dev, dev-to-dev, dev-to-stable).
design_decisions: Created enterPostInstallGuard helper in PluginUpdateSection.tsx to clear active check states and seed the installed override.
Split checkForUpdates calls by source ('automatic' vs 'manual') to suppress automatic check triggers during the pending/post-install window.
Implemented check-suppression bypass check at the very top of checkForUpdates to avoid setting isChecking=true or inFlightCheck.current.
Added pending-install fast path in check_for_plugin_update on the backend to bypass network calls and return 'current' result if version is fresh and effective.
Rolled back post-install guard state on installer reject to recover original candidate state.
Cleared suppression and guard state on load completion when currentVersion equals the target version or diverges from the pre-install version.
results: All 461 unit and static tests passed successfully. Ruff lint/formatting and TypeScript type checking passed without errors.
